title: Security Advisory for PHP packages hosted at packagist.org
description: Security Advisory for PHP packages hosted at packagist.org on GitHub

items.content_html:
Magento versions 2.4.7-p1, 2.4.6-p6, 2.4.5-p8, 2.4.4-p9 and earlier are affected by an Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') vulnerability that could lead in arbitrary code execution by an admin attacker. Exploitation of this issue requires user interaction and scope is changed.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-39402
  • https://helpx.adobe.com/security/products/magento/apsb24-61.html
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2ff6-837j-hg5x
items.title: [magento/community-edition] Magento OS Command ('OS Command Injection') vulnerability

items.content_html:
Magento versions 2.4.7-p1, 2.4.6-p6, 2.4.5-p8, 2.4.4-p9 and earlier are affected by an Improper Authorization vulnerability that could result in a Security feature bypass. A low-privileged attacker could leverage this vulnerability to bypass security measures and modify minor information. Exploitation of this issue does not require user interaction.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-39405
  • https://helpx.adobe.com/security/products/magento/apsb24-61.html
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5g9f-7gqc-8hj4
items.title: [magento/community-edition] Magento Improper Authorization vulnerability

items.content_html:
Magento versions 2.4.7-p1, 2.4.6-p6, 2.4.5-p8, 2.4.4-p9 and earlier are affected by an Improper Authorization vulnerability that could result in a Security feature bypass. A low-privileged attacker could leverage this vulnerability to bypass security measures and modify minor information. Exploitation of this issue does not require user interaction.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-39405
  • https://helpx.adobe.com/security/products/magento/apsb24-61.html
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5g9f-7gqc-8hj4
items.title: [magento/community-edition] Magento Improper Authorization vulnerability
